doc: Total net sales were $383.3 billion in 2023, compared to $394.3 billion in 2022.
The company's headquarters are in Cupertino, California.
Net revenue for fiscal 2023 was $383,285 million.
Apple was founded in 1976 by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne.
iPhone net sales totaled $200.6 billion in fiscal 2023.
The Company faces significant competition in all areas in which it operates.
Apple reported $383.3 billion in revenue for fiscal 2023.
Global economic conditions, geopolitical tensions, and supply chain disruptions may adversely affect the Company.
The Company's products are designed and manufactured to high quality standards.
Failure to manage frequent introductions and transitions of products and services may adversely affect results.
Intelligent Cloud revenue was $87.9 billion for fiscal year 2023.
Microsoft was founded by Bill Gates and Paul Allen in 1975.
Azure and other cloud services revenue increased 27% in fiscal 2023.
The Windows operating system was first released in 1985.
Data Center revenue for fiscal 2024 was $47.5 billion, an increase of 217%.
NVIDIA was founded in 1993 by Jensen Huang, Chris Malachowsky, and Curtis Priem.
NVIDIA's H100 Tensor Core GPU delivers unprecedented performance for AI workloads.
The company designs and markets GPUs for gaming, professional visualization, data centers, and automotive markets.
Net income for fiscal year 2024 was $29.8 billion.
Gross margin was 44.1% in fiscal 2023, compared to 43.3% in fiscal 2022.
Apple's market capitalization reached $3 trillion in 2023.
Products gross margin was 36.5% and Services gross margin was 70.8% in fiscal 2023.
Operating income was $88.5 billion for fiscal year 2023, an increase of 6%.
Microsoft Teams had over 300 million monthly active users.
Productivity and Business Processes segment operating income was $36.1 billion.
